attempt: Move from local feature tests to stateful certificates: finite computations are useful only when they identify the next state variable or global theorem needed to block infinite obstruction paths.
obstruction: Finite witness scans need a stateful inequality ledger that cannot lose constants between major/minor arc states.
candidate_theorem: A cutoff ledger state machine proves the representation count remains positive for every even n beyond N0.
next_experiment: Build a constant-budget state machine with explicit pass/fail transitions for every analytic error term.
claim_boundary: No goldbach proof and no certified goldbach counterexample.
